response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year experience minimum and has strong multi-disciplinary technical skills, they fall significantly short on the core requirement: recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms. Their AI experience is limited to less than a year in infrastructure tooling at their current role, not AI strategy or product development. Additionally, they lack the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field and demonstrate Staff-level rather than Director-level seniority. The background is better suited for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer than a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy.
strengths: 20 years of accumulated software engineering experience across diverse platforms (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) demonstrates broad technical adaptability
Founded and maintained GISCollective since 2016, showing entrepreneurial initiative and ability to drive independent technical vision over sustained periods
Proven technical depth through multiple open-source projects (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Vibe.dav) and conference presentations on technical topics
concerns: AI expertise is extremely recent (less than 1 year) and appears to focus on infrastructure/tooling (MCP code generators) rather than AI strategy, products, or platforms
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification), and no track record of building or shipping AI products at scale with recognized expertise
Demonstrated seniority is Staff level in current role, but position requires Director-level individual contributor with proven strategic leadership and influence across organizations

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
